title: onosma straussii
intro: Onosma straussii, also known as Strauss's Onosma, is a plant species in the borage family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Middle East, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant's root and leaves contain iridoid glycosides, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Onosma straussii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function.
